title: Did the woman get what she wanted?

meanings.usage: 复数形式，表示一种下装
常与for a moment搭配使用
指商店里提供服务的人
常用于对做错事的人进行处罚
be eager to do something表示渴望做某事
with great difficulty表示费了很大力气
用于引导让步状语从句
decide to do something表示决定做某事

phrases.usage: 穿着牛仔裤，in+衣物表示穿着状态

examples.en: The woman in jeans stood at the window.
examples.zh: 穿着牛仔裤的女人站在橱窗前。

examples.en: She hesitated for a moment before going in.
examples.zh: 她在进去之前犹豫了一会儿。

examples.en: The woman walked out of the shop angrily.
examples.zh: 那个女人生气地走出了商店。

examples.en: She decided to punish the assistant next day.
examples.zh: 她决定第二天惩罚那个店员。

examples.en: She returned dressed in a fur coat.
examples.zh: 她穿着皮草大衣回来了。

examples.en: After seeking out the rude assistant, she asked for the same dress.
examples.zh: 找到那个粗鲁的店员后，她要买同样的裙子。

phrases.usage: 渴望做某事，热切地想做

examples.en: The assistant was eager to serve her this time.
examples.zh: 这次店员热切地为她服务。

examples.en: With great difficulty, he climbed into the shop window.
examples.zh: 费了很大力气，他爬进了商店橱窗。

examples.en: She enjoyed herself making the assistant bring almost everything.
examples.zh: 她让店员把几乎所有东西都拿了出来，玩得很开心。

examples.en: She returned to the shop the following morning.
examples.zh: 第二天早上她回到了商店。

grammar.title: 一般过去时 (Past Simple Tense)
grammar.definition: 表示过去发生的动作或存在的状态
grammar.structure: 主语 + 动词过去式 + 其他
grammar.usage: 用于叙述过去发生的事情，如本课讲述女人去商店的故事

examples.en: She stood at the window of an expensive shop.
examples.zh: 她站在一家高档商店的橱窗前。

examples.en: The assistant told her that the dress was sold.
examples.zh: 店员告诉她裙子已经卖掉了。

grammar.title: 让步状语从句 (Though/Although Clause)
grammar.structure: Though/Although + 主语 + 动词... + 主句
grammar.usage: 用于表达两个相反的事实，though位于句首时可用逗号与主句隔开

examples.en: Though she hesitated for a moment, she finally went in.
examples.zh: 虽然她犹豫了一会儿，但最后还是进去了。

grammar.title: 过去进行时 (Past Continuous Tense)
grammar.definition: 表示过去某一时刻或时间段正在进行的动作
grammar.structure: 主语 + was/were + 动词-ing + 其他
grammar.usage: 用于描述故事发生的背景或正在进行的动作

examples.en: A woman in jeans stood at the window.
examples.zh: 一个穿着牛仔裤的女人站在橱窗前。

sentencePatterns.pattern: A woman/man in + 衣物 stood at...

original.en: A woman in jeans stood at the window of an expensive shop.
original.zh: 一个穿着牛仔裤的女人站在一家高档商店的橱窗前。

imitations.en: A man in a suit stood at the door.
imitations.zh: 一个穿着西装的男人站在门口。

imitations.en: A girl in a red dress stood at the bus stop.
imitations.zh: 一个穿着红裙子的女孩站在公交站。

sentencePatterns.pattern: Though + 主语 + 动词... + 主句

original.en: Though she hesitated for a moment, she finally went in.
original.zh: 虽然她犹豫了一会儿，但她最后还是进去了。

imitations.en: Though it was raining, they went out.
imitations.zh: 虽然下雨了，但他们还是出去了。

imitations.en: Though he was tired, he finished his work.
imitations.zh: 虽然他很累，但他完成了工作。

sentencePatterns.pattern: After + doing something, 主语 + 动词过去式...

original.en: After seeking out the rude assistant, she asked for the same dress.
original.zh: 找到那个粗鲁的店员后，她要买同样的裙子。

imitations.en: After finishing lunch, I went for a walk.
imitations.zh: 吃完午饭后，我去散步了。

imitations.en: After reading the book, I understood the story.
imitations.zh: 读完这本书后，我理解了这个故事。

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + was/were + 动词-ing + when + 主语 + 动词过去式...

original.en: She was dressed in a fur coat, with a handbag in one hand and a long umbrella in the other.
original.zh: 她穿着皮草大衣，一手拎着手提包，一手拿着长柄伞。

imitations.en: He was wearing a blue shirt, with glasses on his nose.
imitations.zh: 他穿着蓝色衬衫，鼻子上戴着眼镜。
